findings.title: CF Access middleware checks header presence only, NOT JWT signature
findings.description: Middleware verifică doar headerul Cf-Access-Authenticated-User-Email. Nu validează semnătura Cf-Access-Jwt-Assertion cu CF public key. Atacator care obține URL-ul direct *.run.app (ctd-y3db3fpgsq-ew.a.run.app sau ctd-175951084865.europe-west1.run.app) poate face request bypass CF Access cu header injectat manual.
findings.exploit_scenario: 1) Atacator descoperă URL Cloud Run prin DNS recon, log scraping sau leak. 2) curl direct la .run.app URL cu header 'Cf-Access-Authenticated-User-Email: cristian@acda.ro' fără să treacă prin CF edge. 3) Server vede email în whitelist → returnează date proiect/client.
findings.impact: Bypass complet CF Access auth. Acces full la 22 endpoint-uri /api/ + GDrive upload OAuth (cu rapoarte clienți). Severitate redusă de obscuritatea URL-ului + 7 users only. Ridicată de natura datelor (rapoarte CTD client cu transcriere apel + EBIT).
findings.recommendation: Validează JWT cu jose sau jsonwebtoken: fetch CF public keys de la https://acda-os.cloudflareaccess.com/cdn-cgi/access/certs (cache 24h), verifică signature + audience (CF Access App AUD tag) + expiry pe headerul Cf-Access-Jwt-Assertion. Pattern documentat: https://developers.cloudflare.com/cloudflare-one/identity/authorization-cookie/validating-json/. Effort: ~30 min CC.
findings.playbook: Already in DEPLOY_REPORT.md TODO ('URGENT — CF Access JWT validation'). Pre-existing finding, surfaced again by /cso pe v0.2.0 commit pentru completness. Recommend land before Sprint 2 / team onboarding.
findings.verification: self-verified — read middleware code, confirmed only req.headers['cf-access-authenticated-user-email'] checked, no JWT lib import

tools_skipped: npm audit deferred — same accepted vulns as v0.1.0 (vite dev-only, dompurify client-side)
v0.2.0_delta_positive: REMOVED Tailscale 1.96.4 binary (~30 MB attack surface eliminated)
REMOVED iptables apt package (privilege escalation tooling — gone)
REMOVED socat apt package (TCP relay tooling — gone)
REMOVED tailscaled state writable dir at /tmp
REMOVED TS_AUTHKEY env var (one fewer secret in container env)
Connection mode unix socket (kernel-mediated, not TCP) — eliminates network-level auth bypass risk

below_gate_noted.title: Dockerfile lacks USER directive (runs as root)
below_gate_noted.rationale_skip: Cloud Run gVisor sandbox + read-only rootfs mitigates blast radius. Best-practice nice-to-have, not a real exploit path.

below_gate_noted.title: CORS wildcard via app.use(cors()) — any origin allowed
below_gate_noted.rationale_skip: App entirely behind CF Access; CSRF target is already-authenticated whitelist user. Edge gating absorbs risk.

below_gate_noted.title: Orphan secret ctd-ts-authkey (Tailscale auth key)
below_gate_noted.rationale_skip: Not a vulnerability — hygiene. Same status as ctd-pg-password. Defer to TE-ROTATE-CREDS-001 batch cleanup.

disclaimer: /cso is an AI-assisted scan, not a substitute for professional pentest. v0.2.0 reduced attack surface vs v0.1.0; remaining HIGH finding is pre-existing JWT-validation gap already documented.
